distilleries.name: Vedrenne and Le Cassissium
distilleries.address: 8 Passage des Freres Montgolfier, 21700 Nuits-Saint-Georges, France
distilleries.description: Liqueur house Vedrenne in Nuits-Saint-Georges, home of Le Cassissium, an educational and gourmet visitor centre on the history of blackcurrant liqueur ending in a tasting of the range.
distilleries.distillation_method: Cold maceration of blackcurrants in alcohol for creme de cassis; copper-still distillation for marc and eaux-de-vie
distilleries.tasting_program: Le Cassissium guided visit with tasting; reservations mandatory

distilleries.name: Maison Gabriel Boudier
distilleries.description: Dijon liqueur maker since 1874, one of only four houses entitled to label Creme de Cassis de Dijon. Produces classic blackcurrant liqueur plus a range of fruit cremes, guignolet and gin.
distilleries.distillation_method: Cold maceration of blackcurrants for creme de cassis; pot-still distillation for spirits
distilleries.tasting_program: Production site, not a regular public visitor cellar; products tasted at Dijon merchants

distilleries.name: Maison Lejay Lagoute
distilleries.description: Dijon house that claims the original 1841 creme de cassis recipe, one of four entitled to the Creme de Cassis de Dijon name. Opens its site for educational and gourmet visits on cassis production.
distilleries.distillation_method: Cold maceration of blackcurrants in alcohol, recipe unchanged since 1841
distilleries.tasting_program: Educational and gourmet guided visits open to all by reservation

distilleries.name: Maison Briottet
distilleries.description: Sixth-generation Dijon liqueur house founded 1836, among the makers entitled to the Creme de Cassis de Dijon name, producing blackcurrant liqueur, fruit cremes and Burgundian aperitifs.
distilleries.distillation_method: Cold maceration of fruit in alcohol for cremes; copper-still distillation for marc
distilleries.tasting_program: No physical shop at the production address; products available through the online boutique

distilleries.name: Distillerie Joseph Cartron
distilleries.address: 25 Rue du Docteur Louis Legrand, 21700 Nuits-Saint-Georges, France
distilleries.classification: Marc de Bourgogne and Creme de Cassis de Bourgogne
distilleries.description: Distillers in Nuits-Saint-Georges since 1882, producing blackcurrant and red-fruit cremes alongside Marc de Bourgogne, Fine de Bourgogne, ratafia and Burgundian aperitifs.
distilleries.distillation_method: Cold maceration for cremes; copper pot-still distillation of grape pomace for marc and fine
distilleries.tasting_program: Production site not generally open to visitors; contact in advance
